fields.name: random:texture used to generate random values per particle
turbulence type#the type of turbulence this particle will experience
depth_range#depth range over which the particle will collide
death#percentage change [0-1] that the particle will die on collision
change type#the type this particle will change into on collision
render parameters
fields.definition:
cheap particles do not use alpha-blend transparency, they use multiply-and-add
as such, an alpha of zero gives you additive particles, and an alpha of one gives you alpha-blend particles

fields.name: fade start:[0,1]#point in particles lifetime at which fade begins
motion blur stretch#how much the particle stretches as it moves
texture y scale#scales the texture in the y direction
turb du dt#change in u coordinate over time
turb dv dt#change in v coordinate over time
turb du dp#change in u coordinate per particle
turb dv dp#change in v coordinate per particle
